ItacPersonItem.Notes: The son of Giulivo and the father of Stefano Antonio, Carlo was the Viceprefect of the Archive of Castel Sant`Angelo. See A. Petrucci, `Cartari, Carlo`, in DBI. Also member of the Arcadia, of the Ansiosi (Gubbio), Apatisti (Florence), Concordi (Ravenna), and Incitati (Faenza)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
